inline_comments.message:
@Bruno - I was getting an error in the timestamp when running a build so I adde this quick hack. Can you please have a look and advise on how to proceed?

Below is a snippet of the error I recieve:

assert (expectedValue == URLDecoder.decode(values.get(0), Charset.defaultCharset()))
|                             |             |             |      |      |               |
|                             |             false         |      |      |               windows-1252
|                             |                           |      |      '2021-07-24T03%25253A00%25253A01.000-0400'
|                             |                           |      ['2021-07-24T03%25253A00%25253A01.000-0400']
|                             |                           '2021-07-24T03%253A00%253A01.000-0400'
|                             '2021-07-24T03:00:01.000-0400'
